questionHtml: Sex is determined in the same way in pangolins as in humans. State how many autosomes there are in somatic cells of M. pentadactyla.

meta.title: Sex is determined in the same way in pangolins as in humans. State how many autosomes there are in somatic cells of M. pentadactyla.
breadcrumbLabels: D3.2.1. Production of haploid gametes in parents and their fusion to form a diploid zygote as the means of inheritance
